description: Fail-closed contract for deterministic chaos scenario DSL coverage, golden projections, and LabRuntime compile targets.

scenario_rows.description: Network partition plus cancellation storm must replay deterministically and drain losers.
scenario_rows.status_reason: contracted only; partition plus cancellation-storm DSL runner is not wired yet

scenario_rows.description: Disk pressure plus delayed cleanup must bound artifact emission and still close regions.
scenario_rows.status_reason: contracted only; disk-pressure and delayed-cleanup faults are not wired yet

scenario_rows.description: A process stall failure must emit a deterministic minimized counterexample packet.
scenario_rows.status_reason: contracted only; process-stall minimization output is not wired yet

golden_markdown:
| scenario_id | status | fault_dimensions | expected_invariants |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| chaos-disk-pressure-cleanup-delay | XFAIL | disk_pressure, delayed_cleanup, resource_caps | quiescence, no_obligation_leaks, bounded_artifact_output, deterministic_replay |
| chaos-partition-cancel-storm | XFAIL | network_partition, cancellation_storm | quiescence, losers_drained, no_obligation_leaks, deterministic_replay |
| chaos-process-stall-minimized-counterexample | XFAIL | process_stall, minimized_counterexample | quiescence, losers_drained, deterministic_replay |
proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_chaos_scenario_dsl_contract CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test chaos_scenario_dsl_contract -- --nocapture
